violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. A 2 door commercial refrigerator containing potentially hazardous food is maintaining an internal temperature of 45 F.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. A 2 door commercial refrigerator containing potentially hazardous food is maintaining an internal temperature of 45 F.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease build up at right side of oven. -Sticky residue in several plastic containers used for syrup storage.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Grease residue with visible dust build up at hood vents.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Cheesy hashbrown mix and gravy made yesterday (stated as ice bathed and fully cooled) found with temps of 44 and 47F. *Staff rearranged that side of the fridge for better air flow with direction to ice product to bring temps down ASAP.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
